name: Monsarrat Shave Ice
tagline: Real fruit compotes layered into silky ice — the gourmet shave ice that Diamond Head locals swear by.
mustOrder: Any flavor with ice cream and mochi balls — the full experience
Coconut cream or matcha — the house signatures
Mango or mixed berry — pure real fruit, no artificial syrup
parking: Street parking on Monsarrat Ave — limited but usually findable on weekdays
talkStory: Run out of a tiny window beside Pioneer Saloon on Monsarrat Ave, this operation uses real organic fruit jams and compotes layered by hand -- no pumps, no artificial syrups. The owner sources fruit from small Oahu farms and you can taste the difference in every spoonful. They close on rainy days because the walk-up window concept doesn't work in the rain, and they'd rather close than compromise quality. Add Meadow Gold ice cream and shiratama mochi balls for the full experience.
